evidence.text: # Magnific-Evals A python package for testing LLMs with custom evaluation criterias, specifically for multi-turn conversations under customer service scenarios. ## Installation ```bash pip install magnific-llm-evals ``` This will automatically install all required dependencies. Alternatively, if installing from source: ```bash git clone https://github.com/austinw1995/magnific-llm-evals cd magnific-llm-evals pip install -r requirements.txt pip install -e . ``` ## Features - Evaluate multiple LLMs against various customer conversation scenarios by customizing the service and customer agents - Define custom
